import numpy as np, os
DATA = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data')
val_y = np.load(os.path.join(DATA,'val_target.npy'), mmap_mode='r')
train_y = np.load(os.path.join(DATA,'train_target.npy'), mmap_mode='r')
print('val_y shape', val_y.shape)
print('val_y mean range', val_y.mean(0).min(), val_y.mean(0).max())
v = val_y.var(0)
print('val_y var range', v.min(), v.max())
print('var sorted (smallest 10):', np.sort(v)[:10])
print('var sorted (largest 5):', np.sort(v)[-5:])
print('num near-zero var:', (v<1e-6).sum())
# Check train
idx = np.random.choice(train_y.shape[0], 200000, replace=False)
idx.sort()
ty = np.array(train_y[idx])
print('train sample var range', ty.var(0).min(), ty.var(0).max())
print('train sample mean abs range', np.abs(ty.mean(0)).max())
